name: python3-pylnk3
title: python3-pylnk3
summary: Python library for reading and writing Windows shortcut files (.lnk)
description:
Python library for reading and writing Windows shortcut files (.lnk)
This package contains a Python library for reading and writing Windows
shortcut files (.lnk).
.
This library can parse .lnk files and extract all relevant information from
them. Parsing a .lnk file yields a LNK object which can be altered and saved
again. Moreover, .lnk file can be created from scratch be creating a LNK
object, populating it with data and then saving it to a file. As that process
requires some knowledge about the internals of .lnk files, some convenience
functions are provided.
.
Limitation: Windows knows lots of different types of shortcuts which all have
different formats. This library currently only supports shortcuts to files and
folders on the local machine.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

commands.name: pylnk3
commands.description: Tool for read or create .lnk files

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pylnk3 because Python library for reading and writing Windows shortcut files (.lnk).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pylnk3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pylnk3 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pylnk3.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pylnk3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pylnk3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
